title: Checkpoint stable refactor baseline before next roadmap
summary: TASK-033 baseline gate closed: stable dogfood checkpoint recorded with honest pass/block outcomes.

goal.outcome: After TASK-040 hardens the verifier, current TASK-028 through TASK-032 are verified, closed, and recorded as a stable dogfooding baseline.
acceptance: TASK-040 is done and `task-close` verification gateway is active.
TASK-028 through TASK-032 have fresh verification evidence from the hardened verifier and are either closed or explicitly blocked.
`npm test` passes on the stable baseline.
A release checkpoint records git SHA, canonical digest, view schema version, and closed-task summaries.
non_goals: Do not implement new sprint, skill, UI, agency, or runtime features in this gate.
Do not rely on the previous weak verifier path for baseline closure.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck` if available/required for the touched code.
Run `codewiki_state refresh=true` and confirm green health.
